In this lesson, I’ll teach you how to create a pricing
strategy that focuses on customer acquisition
costs, arguably the biggest focus area to scale your
product. This is important because as the following
images show, they can really go a long way.
Common Pricing Mistakes
• 	Underestimating CAC
• 	Focusing on (%) margin instead of ($) margin
• 	Starting with a high price and reducing it
